description: Conflict events appear sequentially across a regional map with explosion shockwaves. Four marker types: strike (missile/airstrike), warning (threat alert), troops (ground forces), incident (civilian/infrastructure). Best for war coverage, attack campaigns, security incident maps.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Headline, e.g. 'ATTACK MAP — UKRAINE' or 'CONFLICT INCIDENTS: MARCH 2025'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Summary line, e.g. 'ACLED data: 127 verified incidents in Q1 2025'
fields.MAP_LABEL_1: Region name shown in stats panel, e.g. 'UKRAINE' or 'GAZA STRIP'
fields.STAT_VALUE_1: Total incident count or key figure, e.g. '127' or '43'
fields.LABEL_1: Label for total stat, e.g. 'VERIFIED INCIDENTS' or 'AIRSTRIKES'
